name: ethanhq
description: Ethan Guo's Claude Code plugins — currently cc-fleet (vendor LLM teammates / subagents).

plugins.name: cc-fleet
plugins.description: Spawn any third-party LLM vendor with an Anthropic-compatible API as real Claude Code agent-team teammates or one-shot subagents via the cc-fleet CLI — driven just like native teammates; your main session's own auth (OAuth or API key) is untouched, vendor workers bill the vendor key.
